[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000110 2
1 110000000 2
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000010 1
7 100000000 1

23 32 010000000 1
